     The Numbers Business Report

Monkey Man (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,116,955Details
International Box Office $10,397,768
Worldwide Box Office $35,514,723
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $329,759
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $752,566
Total $1,082,325
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Kid, an anonymous young man ekes out a meager living in an underground fight club where, night after night, wearing a gorilla mask, he is beaten bloody by more popular fighters for cash. After years of suppressed rage, Kid discovers a way to infiltrate the enclave of the city’s sinister elite. As his childhood trauma boils over, his mysteriously scarred hands unleash an explosive campaign of retribution to settle the score with the men who took everything from him.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,119,435 (40.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.48 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:70.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,029 opening theaters/3,037 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $26,560,457

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 5th, 2024 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: April 3rd, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
April 4th, 2024 (Wide) (Bulgaria)
April 4th, 2024 (Wide) (South Africa)
April 4th, 2024 (Wide) (Italy)
April 4th, 2024 (Wide) (Singapore)
Video Release: April 23rd, 2024 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence throughout, rape, language throughout, sexual content/nudity and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2806 (cert #53566), 10/25/2023)
R for strong bloody violence throughout, language throughout, sexual content/nudity and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2821 (cert #53566), 2/14/2024)
Running Time: 120 minutes
Film festival: South by Southwest Film Festival 2024
Filming location (country): Indonesia
Geographical setting: India
Plot point: Life on the Outside
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Folk Tale/Legend/Fairytale
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Thunder Road Film, Monkeypaw Pictures, Bron Studios, Creative Wealth Media Finance, Universal Pictures, Minor Realm, S’YA Concept, WME Independent
Production Countries: United States, Canada
Languages: English

Synopsis

Kid, an anonymous young man ekes out a meager living in an underground fight club where, night after night, wearing a gorilla mask, he is beaten bloody by more popular fighters for cash. After years of suppressed rage, Kid discovers a way to infiltrate the enclave of the city’s sinister elite. As his childhood trauma boils over, his mysteriously scarred hands unleash an explosive campaign of retribution to settle the score with the men who took everything from him.
